name: Customers Over Credit Limit
query:
SELECT
    `tabUdhaar Customer`.`name` AS "Customer:Link/Udhaar Customer:200",
    `tabUdhaar Customer`.`phone` AS "Phone:Data:150",
    `tabUdhaar Customer`.`current_balance` AS "Balance:Currency:120",
    `tabUdhaar Customer`.`credit_limit` AS "Credit Limit:Currency:120",
    `tabUdhaar Customer`.`preferred_language` AS "Language:Data:100"
FROM
    `tabUdhaar Customer`
WHERE
    `tabUdhaar Customer`.`current_balance` > `tabUdhaar Customer`.`credit_limit`
ORDER BY
    `tabUdhaar Customer`.`current_balance` DESC
